generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf/
prefix base: http://example.org/base/

instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring ambient external temperature (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureData
]

instance ChamberAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring internal chamber air temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChamberAirTemperatureData
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring heatbed temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureData
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance ChamberAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChamberAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance AmbientTemperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature data from DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ChamberAirTemperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time chamber air temperature data from DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChamberAirTemperatureData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance HeatbedTemperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time heatbed temperature data from DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy-based model with 2 parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform air temperature and no heatbed thermal inertia",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy-based model with 4 parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) including heatbed thermal dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker facilitating real-time data flow from physical components to virtual model",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller with GPIO interface for sensor data acquisition and actuator control",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance PythonSoftwareStack : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based software stack for DT implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance ScipyOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares parameter calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance ExampleIncubatorRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "INTO-CPS-Association/example-incubator open-source GitHub repository",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDevelopmentService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for temperature prediction using dynamic energy-based models",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for model parameter calibration using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time monitoring of system safety and performance",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for fault detection in physical components",
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for state estimation from sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for supervisory control decisions based on model predictions",
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature prediction using dynamic energy-based models",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for model parameter optimization using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterOptimizationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time system monitoring for safety violations and suboptimal performance",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetected, SuboptimalPerformanceDetected
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection service for identifying sensor or actuator anomalies",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service for inferring system states from sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimatedSystemState
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control service for adjusting physical components based on DT analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatbed, AdjustFan
]

instance ModelDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model development service for initial model creation and parameter calibration",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDevelopmentInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance ModelParameterOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized model parameters for accurate simulation"
]

instance SafetyViolationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of safety violations in temperature ranges"
]

instance SuboptimalPerformanceDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of suboptimal thermal performance in incubator system"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of faults in physical components or sensors"
]

instance EstimatedSystemState : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated internal state of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ModelDevelopmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from model development process"
]

instance AdjustHeatbed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed power based on model predictions",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFan : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed based on model predictions",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "214×214×3mm heatbed component"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with 0.02m³/s airflow"
]

instance RaspberryPiHardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller with GPIO interface"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heatbed actuator controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers (4A current capability)"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO via PCB"
]

instance Container : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (0.03m³ air volume)"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container (0.03m³ air volume), heatbed (214×214×3mm), fan (0.02m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply",
    base:contains Container, Heatbed, Fan, AmbientTemperatureSensor, ChamberAirTemperatureSensor, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPiHardware, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, PowerSupply
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment ThermalIncubatorEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed control) via RabbitMQ to low-level driver, which executes hardware control using bang-bang parameters (UL, LL, H, C) to regulate temperature."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time control with fan airflow cycle of 2 seconds (0.03m³ volume / 0.02m³/s airflow); calibration performed offline using non-linear least squares optimization; controller parameters (H, C) operate on sub-second to second scales for thermal regulation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture with RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi, low-level driver handling sensor/actuator communication, controller implementing bang-bang logic, and simulation models for prediction; information flows via RabbitMQ between physical and virtual components as shown in Fig. 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), integrating models into the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring, prediction, and control after initial deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions validated via experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity testing with three sensors); Model B validated for superior thermal inertia prediction; calibration minimizes residual error using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver with experimental trajectories."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker protocol for all communication between physical components (sensors, actuators) and virtual models, with RabbitMQ server running locally on Raspberry Pi for synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosts RabbitMQ server, low-level driver, controller software, and simulation models; all components deployed on-premises on the physical device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates safe protocol to maintain device safety; bang-bang controller enforces upper/lower temperature limits (UL, LL) to prevent overheating; no explicit cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
